title: Coordinates, Scalars, Vector2, Angles, and Units
description: The ship stores integer x and y, mixes degrees with radians, normalizes a zero vector, treats screen y as mathematical y, and adds pixels per second directly to position. Learners cumulatively produce unit-labeled 2D geometry model through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Declare screen origin, axes, handedness, logical viewport, centers, bounds, and world-to-screen conversion.
Use Vector2 addition, subtraction, scaling, magnitude, squared distance, dot, cross, copy, and mutation with explicit meaning.
Derive facing vectors from a named zero-angle and degree convention and test clockwise screen appearance.
